title: Web UI MVP: dashboard workspace/readiness/MIASI
tests: python -m pytest tests/test_api_security.py tests/test_api_local.py tests/test_api_contract.py tests/test_web_ui_mvp.py tests/test_sprint_69_documentation.py -q
risks: MVP visual, no E2E browser automation yet.
Token in browser sessionStorage is local MVP only.
Vite dev server requires npm install for interactive browser use.
next_sprint: FUNC-SPRINT-70 — Report Viewer y Trace Viewer

architectural_decision.rationale: FUNC-SPRINT-69 implements the Web UI local MVP under ADR-0013/Web UI first and the Sprint 64 UI/API threat model; it does not change the frontend/API strategy.

pass_criteria: Dashboard local displays workspace, readiness, standards and MIASI cards.
Web UI consumes only /api/v1 endpoints and sends X-DevPilot-Token.
Frontend does not import devpilot_core, Python modules, .devpilot or outputs directly.
UI remains read-only and exposes no write/execute actions.
Smoke test and Python contract tests pass.
README, runbook, backlog, internal contract, audit and manifest remain synchronized.
block_criteria: Frontend imports Python/core modules or reads local repo files directly.
Frontend requires external APIs or paid services.
Token is hardcoded or persisted in source files.
Node/UI installation steps are not documented.
pyproject dependency state leaves Starlette TestClient warning unresolved by design.
